title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.572 - Repeal of sales tax, procedure
text:
67.572.  Repeal of sales tax, procedure. — The governing body of any county which has adopted a sales tax pursuant to sections 67.571 to 67.577 may submit the question of repeal of the tax to the voters at any primary or general election.  The ballot of submission shall be in substantially the following form:
(L. 2001 S.B. 323 & 230)
